name: ui-mockup
description: Create and edit UI Mockup/Wireframe from System Design Document — supports ASCII wireframes, HTML mockups with Web Component master page, component specifications, design tokens, CLAUDE.md-aware alert library (SweetAlert2 default), field mapping, framework-aware URL syntax, qa-ui-test v2.5 integration: auto-derive complexity_factors[] + risk_baseline + acceptance_criteria_ids[] in /init-mockup Step 3.55 (factor inference heuristics from components/category/crud_type → seeds qa-create-scenario without code re-scan), validation and quality checks, /help command with mode-based guide, integrated with system-design-doc, frontend-design, qa-ui-test, and brain skills
